sections.paragraph:
a root not used in Kal, pr. to fear, to be terrified, i.q. בָּהַל, comp. بَلَهَ to be feeble, modest (pr. timid).

Piel בִּלֵּהַּ to terrify, to frighten, to cause any one’s mind to be cast down, Ezr 4:4 כתיב. In קרי the more common מבהלים. Syriac ܒܰܠܗܺܝ quadril. to terrify.

Derivatives, בַּלָּהָה, and pr.n. בִּלְהָה, בִּלְהָז.
